creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Nautilus stopped working. I am using pkg binary version. It crashes on start. I have reinstalled the port. I have reinstalled all ports. Port is broken :-(

% nautilus
(org.gnome.Nautilus:99823): GLib-GIO-ERROR **: 23:54:57.604: Settings schema 'org.freedesktop.Tracker.Miner.Files' is not installed
zsh: trace trap  nautilus

% uname -a
FreeBSD 0xCFMX4 12.2-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p1 GENERIC  amd64

% pkg info nautilus
nautilus-3.36.3
Name           : nautilus
Version        : 3.36.3
Installed on   : Fri Jan 15 23:54:54 2021 CET
Origin         : x11-fm/nautilus
Architecture   : FreeBSD:12:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : x11-fm gnome
Licenses       : GPLv3
Maintainer     : gnome@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://wiki.gnome.org/Apps/Nautilus
Comment        : File manager for the GNOME desktop
Options        :
        GVFS           : on
Shared Libs required:
        libgdk-3.so.0
        libtracker-sparql-2.0.so.0
        libglib-2.0.so.0
        libgobject-2.0.so.0
        libpango-1.0.so.0
        libgstpbutils-1.0.so.0
        libcairo.so.2
        libgtk-3.so.0
        libintl.so.8
        libcairo-gobject.so.2
        libatk-1.0.so.0
        libgmodule-2.0.so.0
        libgstreamer-1.0.so.0
        libgnome-autoar-0.so.0
        libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0
        libgnome-desktop-3.so.19
        libgio-2.0.so.0
        libpangocairo-1.0.so.0
        libgexiv2.so.2
Shared Libs provided:
        libnautilus-image-properties.so
        libtotem-properties-page.so
        libnautilus-sendto.so
        libnautilus-extension.so.1
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1201000
        repo_type      : binary
        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 13.6MiB
Description    :
Nautilus is a file manager tightly integrated into the GNOME desktop.
It is also responsible for desktop and icon management, and provides
an intuitive interface for accessing files and webpages.

WWW: https://wiki.gnome.org/Apps/Nautilus
